name: rooms_create
description: Create a new room with configurable settings. Rooms can also be auto-created when the first participant joins. Requires roomCreate permission.

parameters.name: empty_timeout
parameters.description: Seconds to keep the room open after the last participant leaves. Default 300.

parameters.name: departure_timeout
parameters.description: Seconds to keep the room open after the last participant departs.

parameters.name: max_participants
parameters.description: Maximum number of participants allowed in the room. 0 means unlimited.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: Custom metadata string attached to the room.
